gigapan.name: mf04 - Spider and Crude Awakening (Maker Faire 2008)
gigapan.description: The Spider sculpture and the Crude Awakening figure at Maker Faire, San Mateo Fairgrounds, May 3, 2008. Source images IMG_1669–IMG_1726, Canon S5IS at 19.1mm (113mm equiv). Stitched with Hugin from 58 source images.
